api: Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API v5, https://api.searchads.apple.com/api/v5
scope: Fresh migration at legacy capability parity: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (campaigns, ad groups, targeting keywords, ads); creative sets, geo/demographic targeting reports, spend reports, and every write/mutating endpoint are out of scope until Pass B capability expansion. adgroups/keywords/ads are declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is POST for Apple's .../find selector-body search endpoints) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design §E.1 rule 4; monday's and plaid's api_surface.json document the identical convention for their own POST-verb read endpoints) -- these are read-only record listings (a POST-with-body search, not a mutation), and this bundle's Write always rejects with an unsupported-operation error.
